reasoning: I will provide a concise summary of the article, highlighting the injury duration, games potentially missed, and notable related details.
output: Kevin De Bruyne will miss around 10 weeks after an injury, with an initial six-week estimate revised after seeing a specialist. He could miss up to 13 league and cup games, including the League Cup final with Liverpool on 28 February, both legs of the Champions League last-16 tie with Dynamo Kiev, and the Manchester derby on 20 March. The Belgian is City’s second top scorer with 12 goals this season, four behind Sergio Aguero. His agent Patrick de Koster said De Bruyne will work hard to come back. De Bruyne scored one goal and set up another to help City to a 4-3 aggregate victory over Everton. Everton goalkeeper Joel Robles apologized for his reaction on social media regarding the injury.
